name: wxcode-admin-slate-commerce
title: Slate Admin
description: Clean light-mode admin aesthetic: warm white canvas (#ffffff / #f9fafb), emerald accent (#10b981) for positive states and primary actions, amber (#f59e0b) for caution, Inter type with tabular figures, 10px radii, subtle card shadows, and warm slate neutrals. Archetype = fixed sidebar (entity switcher + sectioned nav + user footer) + topbar (search + range selector + notification bell + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with inline sparklines + a metric bar chart + a ranked items panel + a full-width records table with status badges, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this clean light-mode admin aesthetic to my domain — fixed sidebar with entity switcher, topbar with search and range selector, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a metric bar chart, a ranked items panel, and a dense records table with status badges, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个简洁的浅色管理界面风格应用到我的领域：固定侧边栏带实体切换器、顶栏带搜索和范围选择器、4 个带 sparkline 的 KPI 卡片、指标柱状图、排名项面板，以及带状态标签的密集记录表，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
